channel.title: Cricket Score Counter
channel.description: Cricket guides and scoring resources from Cricket Score Counter.

item.title: Cricket Tournament Guide — Teams, Points Table & Player Stats
item.description: How to run a local cricket tournament with Cricket Score Counter — register teams, choose League or Knockout, and track an automatic points table and player leaderboard.

item.title: Cricket Rules Guide for Local Matches
item.description: A complete cricket rules guide covering batting, bowling, fielding, extras, dismissals, innings structure, and local match variations.

item.title: Cricket Match Formats Explained
item.description: A complete guide to cricket match formats — T20, 50-over, Test, box cricket, tennis ball, gully cricket, pairs cricket, and school formats explained.

item.title: Cricket Statistics Explained — Batting, Bowling & Team Stats
item.description: Understand every cricket statistic — batting average, strike rate, economy rate, bowling average, run rate, and more.

item.title: Cricket Resources — Guides, Rules, Formats & Statistics
item.description: All cricket resources in one place — rules guide, match formats, statistics explained, scoring guide, scorekeeping tips, and app help.

item.title: Cricket Scoring Guide
item.description: A practical guide to cricket scoring, including legal balls, extras, wickets, strike rotation, targets, and local match scorekeeping tips.

item.title: Cricket Scorekeeping Tips
item.description: Practical cricket scorekeeping tips for local matches, including extras, wickets, over checks, strike rotation, and live score accuracy.

item.title: Cricket Score Counter FAQ
item.description: Answers to common Cricket Score Counter questions about live scoring, match setup, wides, no-balls, score corrections, and match history.
